title: Drugs confiscated in Bridgton and Dysselsdorp
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS -  Midweek operations in the Garden Route District resulted in the arrest of three suspects for drugs as part of ongoing Safer Festive Season operations in Oudtshoorn and George.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Midweek operations in the Garden Route District resulted in the arrest of three suspects for drugs as part of ongoing Safer Festive Season operations in Oudtshoorn and George."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"On Wednesday, 12 November at about 09:30 Oudtshoorn Crime Prevention unit members acted on intelligence when they raided a house at Dahlia Court, Bridgton in Oudtshoorn."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The team found 62 bankies tik, 10 grams tik, 13 full mandrax, one half mandrax and 71 grams dagga.","html":"The team found 62 bankies tik, 10 grams tik, 13 full mandrax, one half mandrax and 71 grams dagga."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Police confiscated the drugs, two scales and an undisclosed amount of cash. A 33 year old woman found at the premises was arrested on a charge of dealing in drugs.","html":"Police confiscated the drugs, two scales and an undisclosed amount of cash. A 33 year old woman found at the premises was arrested on a charge of dealing in drugs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Meanwhile, later the same day,  Dysselsdorp Crime Prevention unit members, armed with a search warrant, descended on a premises at Paradise View, Dysselsdorp outside Oudtshoorn. A search of the premises led to the confiscation of 40 Full Mandrax and 15 Bankies consisting of tik.","html":"Meanwhile, later the same day, Dysselsdorp Crime Prevention unit members, armed with a search warrant, descended on a premises at Paradise View, Dysselsdorp outside Oudtshoorn. A search of the premises led to the confiscation of 40 Full Mandrax and 15 Bankies consisting of tik."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The suspects will appear in court once charged.","html":"The suspects will appear in court once charged."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Substance abuse remain on of the contributors to serious and violent crime and these arrests and confiscations forms part of concerted efforts to close down illicit drug outlets.","html":"Substance abuse remain on of the contributors to serious and violent crime and these arrests and confiscations forms part of concerted efforts to close down illicit drug outlets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Drugs confiscated in Bridgton and Dysselsdorp
